originalTitle: Suno launches Spark incubator program to feed independent artists to its AI machine
summary: Suno has ambitions to be more than just a toy to churn out AI slop, it also wants to be a streaming destination and to break new artists. Spark is their new incubator program for independent artists that provides grants, mentorship, and marketing support. To apply, artists need to be an unsigned singer, songwriter, or […]
content: Suno has ambitions to be more than just a toy to churn out AI slop, it also wants to be a streaming destination and to break new artists. Spark is their new incubator program for independent artists that provides grants, mentorship, and marketing support. To apply, artists need to be an unsigned singer, songwriter, or producer releasing music under their own name. They also need to agree to some terms and conditions that have raised some eyebrows over on the Suno subreddit. For one, you need to agree to make your songs available on Suno for remixing. That’s not necessarily super concerning, but the broad license it grants Suno to your works, including the ability to create derivative works, is. By agreeing, you also waive your right to a trial and to participate in a class action, and give Suno limited exclusivity to your material. Suno is already facing a proposed class action lawsuit from a group of independent artists. Perhaps most alarming is the “Good Vibes Only” confidentiality and non-disparagement clause that requires you to promote Suno and give the company the right to request edits and removals of your content. It says the participant “will not at any time make any statements or representations, either directly or indirectly, whether orally or in writing, that portrays Suno, Suno personnel, and/or any Suno products or services in a negative light,” and doing so could mean being removed from the program.
chineseTitle: Suno推出Spark孵化器计划，为独立艺术家提供 AI 机器
chineseSummary: Suno 的雄心不仅仅是成为一个生产 AI 垃圾的玩具，它还希望成为一个流媒体目的地并发掘新艺术家。 Spark 是他们为独立艺术家提供的新孵化器计划，提供赠款、指导和营销支持。要申请，艺术家必须是未签约的歌手、词曲作者或[...]
chineseContent: Suno 的雄心不仅仅是成为一个生产 AI 垃圾的玩具，它还希望成为一个流媒体目的地并发掘新艺术家。 Spark 是他们为独立艺术家提供的新孵化器计划，提供赠款、指导和营销支持。要申请，艺术家必须是未签约的歌手、词曲作者或制作人，以自己的名义发行音乐。他们还需要同意一些条款和条件，这些条款和条件在 Suno subreddit 上引起了一些关注。其一，您需要同意在 Suno 上提供您的歌曲进行混音。这不一定是非常令人担忧的，但它授予 Suno 对您的作品的广泛许可，包括创建衍生作品的能力，这是非常令人担忧的。通过同意，您还放弃了审判和参与集体诉讼的权利，并给予 Suno 对您的材料的有限排他性。 Suno 已经面临一群独立艺术家提出的集体诉讼。也许最令人担忧的是“仅限良好氛围”保密和非贬低条款，该条款要求您宣传 Suno 并赋予公司要求编辑和删除您的内容的权利。它表示，参与者“在任何时候都不会直接或间接、无论是口头还是书面形式发表任何对 Suno、Suno 人员和/或任何 Suno 产品或服务产生负面影响的声明或陈述”，这样做可能意味着被从该计划中除名。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
